_publications._publicationTitle: Reprogramming Captures the Genetic and Tumorigenic Properties of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: sphere-forming SCs homogeneously expressed all markers tested...the expression pattern of PNF-derived SCs and sphere-forming SCs were strikingly similar
details: Homogeneously expressed all SC markers tested (p75, S100b, SOX10, GAP43, and PLP) with expression pattern strikingly similar to PNF-derived primary SCs
